00027 #ifndef JELATINE_VM_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_VM_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 #include "class.h"
00032 #include "memory.h"
00033 #include "thread.h"
00034 
00035 /******************************************************************************
00036  * Virtual machine interface                                                  *
00037  ******************************************************************************/
00038 
00039 extern void vm_run( void );
00040 
00041 #if JEL_TRACE
00042 extern bool vm_opt_trace_bytecodes( void );
00043 extern bool vm_opt_trace_methods( void );
00044 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00045 
00046 #if JEL_PRINT
00047 extern bool vm_opt_print_bytecodes( void );
00048 extern bool vm_opt_print_methods( void );
00049 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00050 
00051 /******************************************************************************
00052  * Inlined virtual machine functions                                          *
00053  ******************************************************************************/
00054 
00057 static inline void vm_fail( void )
00058 {
00059     // TODO: This should be improved
00060     exit(1);
00061 } // vm_fail()
00062 
00063 /******************************************************************************
00064  * Options type definitions                                                   *
00065  ******************************************************************************/
00066 
00070 struct options_t {
00071     char *classpath; 
00072     char *boot_classpath; 
00073     size_t heap_size; 
00074     size_t stack_size; 
00075     char *main_class; 
00076     char **jargs; 
00077     int jargs_n; 
00078 
00079 #if JEL_TRACE
00080     bool trace_methods; 
00081     bool trace_opcodes; 
00082 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00083 
00084 #if JEL_PRINT
00085     bool print_methods; 
00086     bool print_opcodes; 
00087     bool print_memory; 
00088 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00089 
00090     bool version; 
00091     bool help; 
00092 };
00093 
00095 typedef struct options_t options_t;
00096 
00097 extern options_t options;
00098 
00099 /******************************************************************************
00100  * Virtual machine options interface                                          *
00101  ******************************************************************************/
00102 
00107 static inline void opts_set_classpath(char *classpath)
00108 {
00109     options.classpath = classpath;
00110 } // opts_set_classpath()
00111 
00115 static inline char *opts_get_classpath( void )
00116 {
00117     return options.classpath;
00118 } // opts_get_classpath()
00119 
00124 static inline void opts_set_boot_classpath(char *boot_classpath)
00125 {
00126     options.boot_classpath = boot_classpath;
00127 } // opts_set_boot_classpath()
00128 
00132 static inline char *opts_get_boot_classpath( void )
00133 {
00134     return options.boot_classpath;
00135 } // opts_get_boot_classpath()
00136 
00140 static inline void opts_set_heap_size(size_t size)
00141 {
00142     options.heap_size = size;
00143 } // opts_set_heap_size()
00144 
00148 static inline size_t opts_get_heap_size( void )
00149 {
00150     return options.heap_size;
00151 } // opts_get_heap_size()
00152 
00156 static inline void opts_set_stack_size(size_t size)
00157 {
00158     options.stack_size = size;
00159 } // opts_set_stack_size()
00160 
00164 static inline size_t opts_get_stack_size( void )
00165 {
00166     return options.stack_size;
00167 } // opts_get_stack_size()
00168 
00173 static inline void opts_set_main_class(char *class_name)
00174 {
00175     options.main_class = class_name;
00176 } // opts_set_main_class()
00177 
00181 static inline char *opts_get_main_class( void )
00182 {
00183     return options.main_class;
00184 } // opts_get_main_class()
00185 
00190 static inline void opts_set_jargs(char **jargs)
00191 {
00192     options.jargs = jargs;
00193 } // opts_set_jargs()
00194 
00199 static inline char **opts_get_jargs( void )
00200 {
00201     return options.jargs;
00202 } // opts_get_jargs()
00203 
00207 static inline void opts_set_jargs_n(int n)
00208 {
00209     options.jargs_n = n;
00210 } // opts_set_jargs_n()
00211 
00215 static inline int opts_get_jargs_n( void )
00216 {
00217     return options.jargs_n;
00218 } // opts_set_jargs_n()
00219 
00220 #if JEL_TRACE
00221 
00225 static inline void opts_set_trace_methods(bool enable)
00226 {
00227     options.trace_methods = enable;
00228 } // opts_set_trace_methods()
00229 
00233 static inline bool opts_get_trace_methods( void )
00234 {
00235     return options.trace_methods;
00236 } // opts_get_trace_methods()
00237 
00241 static inline void opts_set_trace_opcodes(bool enable)
00242 {
00243     options.trace_opcodes = enable;
00244 } // opts_set_trace_opcodes()
00245 
00249 static inline bool opts_get_trace_opcodes( void )
00250 {
00251     return options.trace_opcodes;
00252 } // opts_get_trace_opcodes()
00253 
00254 #endif // JEL_TRACE
00255 
00256 #if JEL_PRINT
00257 
00260 static inline void opts_set_print_methods(bool enable)
00261 {
00262     options.print_methods = enable;
00263 } // opts_set_print_methods()
00264 
00268 static inline bool opts_get_print_methods( void )
00269 {
00270     return options.print_methods;
00271 } // opts_get_print_methods()
00272 
00276 static inline void opts_set_print_opcodes(bool enable)
00277 {
00278     options.print_opcodes = enable;
00279 } // opts_set_print_opcodes()
00280 
00284 static inline bool opts_get_print_opcodes( void )
00285 {
00286     return options.print_opcodes;
00287 } // opts_get_print_opcodes()
00288 
00292 static inline void opts_set_print_memory(bool enable)
00293 {
00294     options.print_memory = enable;
00295 } // opts_set_print_memory()
00296 
00300 static inline bool opts_get_print_memory( void )
00301 {
00302     return options.print_memory;
00303 } // opts_get_memory()
00304 
00305 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00306 
00311 static inline void opts_set_version(bool enable)
00312 {
00313     options.version = enable;
00314 } // opts_set_version()
00315 
00319 static inline bool opts_get_version( void )
00320 {
00321     return options.version;
00322 } // opts_get_version
00323 
00327 static inline void opts_set_help(bool enable)
00328 {
00329     options.help = enable;
00330 } // opts_set_help()
00331 
00335 static inline bool opts_get_help( void )
00336 {
00337     return options.help;
00338 } // opts_get_help()

00340 #endif // !JELATINE_VM_H
